prompt: Create a warm, cinematic anime-style illustration of a young woman and a young man baking donuts together in a cozy kitchen during a golden afternoon. The scene is a vertical 3:4 composition, waist-up view at a wooden countertop, with sunlight streaming through a large multi-pane window on the left and casting soft amber highlights, long shadows, and dust-like glow across the room. The woman stands on the left, petite, wearing a loose cream long-sleeve shirt and a dark brown apron, hair tied in a messy bun with wispy strands; the man stands on the right, taller, wearing a black long-sleeve shirt and a charcoal-gray apron, with tousled black hair and a small earring. Both faces should be intentionally obscured by smooth rectangular blur blocks in warm skin-tone gradients, while their body language feels gentle and intimate as they work side by side. The woman is dipping a donut into chocolate glaze in a small white bowl, and the man is whisking glossy chocolate batter or glaze in a large transparent glass mixing bowl. On the counter, include exactly 8 visible donuts: 7 donuts on a wire cooling rack set over a metal tray, consisting of 3 chocolate-glazed donuts and 4 plain golden donuts, plus 1 donut being dipped in the white bowl. Surround them with baking details: a small bowl of chocolate glaze, a flour bag labeled “FLOUR” on the right, a white mug at the lower right, a folded kitchen towel, a small vase of white daisies on the left, and a small chalkboard menu in the lower left reading “Today’s Menu” and “Donuts” with tiny heart and donut doodles. In the background, add wooden shelves with jars, bowls, and green plants, a hanging note that reads “Donuts love - smile - together,” tiled walls, and a dark pendant lamp in the upper right. Use soft golden afternoon sunlight, detailed painterly brushwork, delicate line art, warm beige and brown color grading, realistic kitchen clutter, romantic slice-of-life atmosphere, shallow depth of field, and high-resolution anime illustration quality. Avoid photorealism, avoid extra people, avoid extra text beyond the specified signs, and keep the overall feeling peaceful, cozy, and affectionate.
